_note: VERIFY base_dom against a trusted local figure. Flagged as estimate in-product until MLS.
source: Seed from public market reports (Redfin/Zillow ranged 57-88; using 60 as working baseline).

condition_multiplier.note: Multiplies base_dom. Move-in-ready sells faster; visible defects slower.

seasonality_factor.note: Multiplies base_dom by listing month. Spring/summer faster. Summer buyers expect move-in-ready: a clean home sells faster, a rough one slower (interacts with condition_multiplier).

carrying_cost_link: estimated_dom drives carrying_costs_monthly in net proceeds; a slower plan can net less than a faster pricier one.
